nodes.name: agent-architecture.md
nodes.summary: Locked reference for the LangGraph agent design, walking six gates from the agent-level contract through the graph's state object, nodes, edges, interrupts/resume, structured-output ACI contracts, and the reliability spine (bounded loops, failure recovery, tracing, human checkpoint, evals).
nodes.languageNotes: Structured as a gated decision walk (Gate 0-6) with a state-object annotation, node/edge tables, and full Zod ACI contracts referenced from packages/schemas.

nodes.name: architecture.md
nodes.summary: Locked reference for EdPath's system architecture: the system-level contract, workflow-not-agent control flow, components and data flow, the CopilotKit bridge, storage (LangGraph Postgres checkpointer), responsibility boundaries, and the locked stack.

nodes.name: design-decisions.md
nodes.summary: The canonical log of locked product-behavior decisions: 6 closed philosophy decisions, 24 load-bearing/remaining flow decisions, 9 numeric bounds, and the architecture edits those locks flag in architecture.md and agent-architecture.md.
nodes.languageNotes: Decision-log format: closed (C1-C6), load-bearing/remaining (D1-D24), and numeric bounds (B1-B9), each with rationale and downstream architecture impact.
